name: shipped-prompts
description: One representative prompt from each of the 7 prompt categories in the shipped catalog (pforge-master/src/prompts.mjs).

prompts.message: What is the current status of the plan? Show me the latest run, which slices are complete, which are in-progress, and any failures.
The slice Slice-03 has failed. Diagnose the failure, explain the root cause, and suggest how to fix it.
prompts.notes: troubleshooting category — troubleshoot lane. Expected tool set widened to any valid diagnostic tool (Phase-37.3).

prompts.message: List all active Crucible smelts. Show which are in-progress, pending review, or ready to finalize.
prompts.notes: crucible list (read-only) — operational lane. Canonical tool is forge_crucible_list; forge_search and forge_status are acceptable fallbacks. Phase-37.3 scenario fix (was forge_capabilities).

prompts.message: Estimate the cost of running the current plan under all four quorum modes (unanimous, majority, any, solo). Which is most cost-effective?
Run a completeness sweep. Find all TODOs, stubs, mocks, and incomplete implementations that need attention.
Give me a full memory system report. What keys are stored, their sizes, and which entries are stale?
Show me a full capabilities overview. List all available tools, extensions, configuration options, and workflows.
How much drift is there between the plan and the actual codebase? What are the biggest gaps?
prompts.notes: drift reports are operational readouts (classifier pattern at intent-router.mjs:134). Lane corrected in Phase-37.3.
